{{Infobox construct
| name = Abyssal Palace towers
| introduced = cradle-08-wintersteel
}}

== Wintersteel ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Abyssal Palace cultists]] erect squat towers that are two-story stone cylinders covered in [[scripts]].}}

[[Category:Constructs]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
